_metadata.source: Data flow mapping between TARA appraisal and OpenEng design skills
_metadata.notes: TARA = Transport Appraisal and Road Assessment. Uses HDM-4/RED methodology for economic appraisal of road investments.

pipelines.name: traffic
pipelines.description: Extract TARA traffic forecast data and calculate design ESA for pavement design

tara_output.format: AADT by vehicle class, annual, with growth rates
tara_output.units: vehicles per day by class, percent growth per annum

skill_6.notes: TARA provides annual growth rates directly; Skill #6 validates and applies them

skill_5.notes: TARA provides annual growth; Skill #5 calculates cumulative ESA over design life

format_conversion_notes: TARA uses annual AADT growth; Skill #5 needs cumulative ESA over design period -- Skill #5 handles the conversion
TARA vehicle classes may differ from MoWT classes (Skill #3) -- map TARA classes to MoWT standard classes before ESA calculation
TARA may provide compound growth rates; Skill #6 can disaggregate by vehicle class if needed

pipelines.name: condition
pipelines.description: Feed road condition data into TARA for economic analysis, and use TARA outputs for maintenance decisions

tara_format.IRI: Direct input -- TARA uses IRI as primary roughness measure
tara_format.condition_category: Map VCI to TARA condition categories if IRI unavailable
tara_format.remaining_service_life: Calculate from condition data and design life

tara_format.intervention_cost: Total treatment cost per km for TARA economic comparison
tara_format.intervention_timing: Year of intervention for discounted cash flow analysis
tara_format.without_project_deterioration: Projected IRI without treatment for 'do-nothing' scenario

data_to_skill_59.purpose: Economic ranking method in Skill #59 prioritization
data_to_skill_59.notes: TARA BCR used directly as economic ranking criterion in MCA; NPV used for absolute comparison

format_conversion_notes: TARA needs 'with-project' and 'without-project' IRI trajectories -- Skill #56 provides current IRI, deterioration model provides projection
TARA economic appraisal uses vehicle operating costs (VOC) as primary benefit measure -- VOC savings from IRI improvement
Analysis period alignment: TARA typically uses 20-year analysis period; ensure design life from Skill #13 matches

pipelines.name: cost
pipelines.description: Feed detailed cost estimates from OpenEng design skills into TARA for economic appraisal

skill_50.notes: Total project cost for TARA economic comparison

skill_51.notes: BoQ subtotals by work category for TARA cost component breakdown

skill_52.notes: Unit rates for sensitivity analysis in TARA

skill_53.notes: Database rates with regional adjustment factors

tara_input_format.total_project_cost: Sum of all BoQ items with contingencies (from Skill #50)
tara_input_format.annual_maintenance_cost: Routine maintenance cost per year (from Skill #57 treatment costs)
tara_input_format.periodic_maintenance_cost: Periodic treatment cost and timing (from Skill #57)
tara_input_format.currency: UGX or USD -- specify which and conversion rate if needed
tara_input_format.price_year: Base year for costs (for inflation adjustment in TARA)

format_conversion_notes: TARA separates capital cost, recurrent cost, and maintenance cost -- map BoQ categories accordingly
Currency conversion: TARA may require USD for cross-country comparison; use Bank of Uganda exchange rate
Price contingency: TARA applies its own price contingency -- do not double-count with Skill #50 price contingency
Annual maintenance costs must be net present values at the discount rate used by TARA (12% for Uganda GoU projects)
